problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Combining Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
